seoTitle: St Clair vs St Ives — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between St Clair and St Ives. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: St Clair vs St Ives: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Clair and St Ives.
heading: St Clair vs St Ives — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Clair, South Australia and St Ives, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Clair has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to St Ives (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Clair or St Ives safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Clair has a flood risk score of 57/100, while St Ives scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Clair scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. St Ives scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Clair or St Ives?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Clair has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
